description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image with a before_script that runs apt-get update -y, apt-get install --yes cmake git psmisc, git submodule update --init --recursive, then builds and installs the RF24 library by cd lib/RF24, ./configure --driver=SPIDEV, make, make install, cp -r utility/ /usr/local/include/RF24/, and returns to the repo root. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job (tagged linux) that executes mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../src/baldur, make, make install, starts baldur with --nopen in background (baldur --nopen &), and then terminates it with killall baldur. In the test stage add a test job that runs mkdir tests, cd tests, cmake ../src/baldur-test, make, and finally runs ./baldur-test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
